jurisdictions.name: Swiss Bank Ombudsman (Dormant Accounts)
process_steps: Search the centralized database of dormant accounts
Submit a search request via the Ombudsman
Provide proof of entitlement (inheritance documents)
Bank verifies the claim and contacts the claimant
required_documents: Proof of death of the account holder
Official certificate of inheritance (Erbschein or equivalent)
jurisdictions.translation_requirements: Documents must be in German, French, or Italian, or accompanied by a certified translation.

jurisdictions.name: German Nachlassgericht (Probate Court)
process_steps: Identify the competent Nachlassgericht (usually where the deceased last resided)
Apply for an Erbschein (Certificate of Inheritance)
Provide a list of all known heirs
Notarize the application
jurisdictions.translation_requirements: All documents must be translated into German by a sworn translator.

jurisdictions.name: UK Dormant Assets Scheme
process_steps: Search via My Lost Account portal
Provide details of the suspected account holder
Wait for banks/building societies to check their records
Complete individual bank claim forms if a match is found
required_documents: Grant of Probate or Letters of Administration
jurisdictions.translation_requirements: Certified translations required for any non-English documents.

legal_terms.Grant of Probate: Legal document giving authority to manage an estate

jurisdictions.name: Italian Postal Bonds (Cassa Depositi e Prestiti)
process_steps: Identify the series and maturity of the bonds
File a claim at any Poste Italiane branch or via CDP
Provide the 'Dichiarazione di Successione' (Inheritance Tax Return)
required_documents: Certified copy of the Declaration of Succession
Tax code (Codice Fiscale) for all heirs
jurisdictions.translation_requirements: Translations into Italian and Apostilles required for foreign documents.

jurisdictions.name: Israeli Land Registry (Tabu)
process_steps: Obtain a land registry extract (Tabu Nesach)
Apply for an Israeli Inheritance Order if not already obtained
Register the transfer of rights at the Land Registry Office
required_documents: Proof of payment of registration fees
jurisdictions.translation_requirements: Documents must be in Hebrew or Arabic, or translated by a notary.

jurisdictions.name: Polish Restitution Claims
process_steps: Identify the property or asset taken during WWII or the Communist era
Submit a claim to the Ministry of Justice or relevant local authority
Provide proof of ownership and proof of inheritance
Often requires a court process in Poland to confirm inheritance
required_documents: Birth and death certificates establishing the family tree
Power of Attorney for a Polish lawyer (often required)
jurisdictions.translation_requirements: All documents must be translated into Polish by a sworn translator.
